name: Jeremiah Grossman
org: Yahoo (security lead); WhiteHat Security (founder); Bishop Fox
why_notable: Co-named and co-researched the clickjacking attack class with RSnake Hansen (2008) — a browser-level attack where a transparent iframe tricks users into clicking hidden elements. Founded WhiteHat Security, one of the early application security companies. Significant contributor to web security research across XSS, CSRF, and browser-based attack surface. His work on browser security directly shaped how the field thinks about client-side attack vectors.
